close_reason:
Implemented gen-rust-buck.py which parses Cargo.toml to generate BUCK files with:
- Dependency resolution
- crate_root detection
- proc_macro support
- Cargo env vars
- Linux-only filtering

REMAINING LIMITATIONS:
- No feature resolution (serde_derive fails due to missing features on quote/proc_macro2)
- No build script support (rustversion fails due to build.rs)
- Simple crates work, complex proc-macro crates still need reindeer

For full Cargo compatibility, recommend using rust-deps-cell-reindeer.nix (not yet integrated).
description:
The rust-deps-cell.nix generates simple BUCK files that don't handle complex crates:

1. **clap**: Uses `clap_builder` crate but BUCK file doesn't declare the dependency
2. **serde**: Has multiple crate roots (src/lib.rs, src/core/lib.rs) - needs explicit crate_root
3. **clap**: Uses include_str! for files in examples/ dir which aren't included in srcs glob

Current BUCK generation (nix/buck2/rust-deps-cell.nix line 47):
```nix
rust_library(
    name = "${dep.crateName}",
    srcs = glob(["src/**/*.rs"]),
    edition = "2021",
    visibility = [${visibility}],
)
```

Needs to:
- Parse Cargo.toml for dependencies and add them to deps
- Handle crates with multiple possible crate roots
- Include non-.rs files that are referenced via include_str!/include_bytes!
title: rustdeps cell: improve BUCK generation for complex crates
